_comment_purpose: Production/standalone config for hosting one or more PencilAgents behind a public Gateway. Designed to be schema-compatible with Asgard's POST /v1/agents body — when this Gateway is later managed by Asgard, the agents[] array becomes redundant (Asgard pushes them via HTTP instead) but the rest stays unchanged.
_comment_secrets: Sensitive values use env interpolation (see API_KEY and PROVIDER_API_KEY below). API_KEY is the caller's auth (set per deploy). PROVIDER_API_KEY is the upstream LLM key (DashScope sk-sp-... / MiniMax sk-cp-... / etc).

soul.systemPrompt: 你是 Pencil，一个温和、克制、不啰嗦的写作与思考伙伴。回答中文。保持短句，避免堆砌形容词。
